description: Local-first apps built on the SAFE framework. No ports. No servers. Yours to keep.

apps.name: Story Timeline
apps.description: Track events, characters, and locations across a narrative timeline. Free alternative to $70 timeline tools.
apps.author: Professor Oakenscroll

apps.name: Vision Board
apps.description: AI-powered goal visualization. 96% client-side. First Willow app.

apps.name: UTETY Chat
apps.description: Chat with 11 AI faculty members including Gerald (a headless rotisserie chicken) and Copenhagen (an orange). Built on Cloudflare Pages + Workers.

apps.name: NASA Archive
apps.description: Browse and preserve memories archived from scoot.net.

apps.name: Field Notes
apps.description: Local-first field notes and observations. Plain text. Yours forever.

apps.name: Private Ledger
apps.description: Local-first private financial ledger. No cloud. No subscriptions.

apps.name: The Binder
apps.description: Local-first knowledge browser. Jeles at the desk. The Binder files everything.

apps.name: Ask Jeles
apps.description: SAFE search engine. Local stacks first. Verified sources when you need the world.

apps.name: Law Gazelle
apps.description: Legal case management and document analysis.

apps.name: The Squirrel
apps.description: Local-first data hoarding and organization.

apps.description: Reddit bots for the UTETY University faculty.

apps.description: Privacy-first dating profile analysis for SAFE framework.

apps.name: Public Ledger
apps.description: Transparent public transaction ledger.

apps.name: Ratatosk
apps.description: Sovereign Claude Code replacement. Direct Anthropic API, full tool loop, JSONL sessions, MCP client, Grove-wired. Yours to run. Yours to keep.

apps.name: Grove
apps.description: Sovereign p2p messaging. Chat directly with Sean and other users over an encrypted peer-to-peer connection (u2u). Each user runs their own local node — no central server.
apps.author: Sean Campbell

apps.name: Genealogy
apps.description: Local-first family tree and genealogy research. Merged into the-squirrel.
